[Saint George's Cross](/wiki/Saint_George%27s_Cross "Saint George's Cross") [Flag of England](/wiki/File:Flag_of_England.svg "Flag of England") | [St. George](/wiki/Saint_George "Saint George")[[1]](#cite_note-1) [Patron Saint: St. George](/wiki/File:St._Georg,_Donatello,_1416-17,_Bargello_Florenz-03.jpg "Patron Saint: St. George") | [Tudor Rose](/wiki/Tudor_rose "Tudor rose")[[2]](#cite_note-National_Emblems_of_Britain-2) [National Flower: Tudor Rose](/wiki/File:Tudor_Rose.svg "National Flower: Tudor Rose") | "Lion" | [Royal arms of England](/wiki/Coat_of_arms_of_England "Coat of arms of England") [Coat of Arms: 3 Gold Lions on a Red Field](/wiki/File:Royal_arms_of_England.svg "Coat of Arms: 3 Gold Lions on a Red Field") | **[Dieu et mon droit](/wiki/Dieu_et_mon_droit "Dieu et mon droit")** ([French](/wiki/French_language "French language")) "God and my right" | "[Jerusalem](/wiki/And_did_those_feet_in_ancient_time "And did those feet in ancient time")" (Unofficial but widely regarded) (*[de facto](/wiki/De_facto "De facto")*)  See also [Proposed national anthems of England](/wiki/National_anthem_of_England "National anthem of England"). |

[Cross of Saint Andrew](/wiki/Flag_of_Scotland "Flag of Scotland") [Flag of Scotland](/wiki/File:Flag_of_Scotland.svg "Flag of Scotland") | [St. Andrew](/wiki/Andrew_the_Apostle "Andrew the Apostle")[[3]](#cite_note-3) [Patron Saint: St. Andrew](/wiki/File:Rubens_apostel_andreas_grt.jpg "Patron Saint: St. Andrew") | [Thistle](/wiki/Cirsium_vulgare "Cirsium vulgare")[[2]](#cite_note-National_Emblems_of_Britain-2) [National Flower: Thistle](/wiki/File:Scottish_Thistle_(Heraldry).svg "National Flower: Thistle") | "[Unicorn](/wiki/Unicorn "Unicorn")" | [Royal arms of Scotland](/wiki/Coat_of_arms_of_Scotland "Coat of arms of Scotland") [Coat of Arms: A Red Lion on a Yellow Field, surrounded by a red double royal tressure flory counter-flory device](/wiki/File:Royal_Arms_of_the_Kingdom_of_Scotland.svg "Coat of Arms: A Red Lion on a Yellow Field, surrounded by a red double royal tressure flory counter-flory device") | *[In my defens God me defend](/wiki/In_my_defens_God_me_defend "In my defens God me defend")* ([Scots](/wiki/Scots_language "Scots language")) "In my defence God me defend" | "[Flower of Scotland](/wiki/Flower_of_Scotland "Flower of Scotland")" (*de facto*)  See also [Proposed national anthems of Scotland](/wiki/National_anthem_of_Scotland "National anthem of Scotland"). |

[The Red Dragon](/wiki/Welsh_Dragon "Welsh Dragon") [Flag of Wales](/wiki/File:Flag_of_Wales.svg "Flag of Wales") | [St. David](/wiki/Saint_David "Saint David")[[4]](#cite_note-4) [Patron Saint: St. David](/wiki/File:Castell_Coch_stained_glass_panel_2.JPG "Patron Saint: St. David") | [Leek](/wiki/Leek "Leek")[[2]](#cite_note-National_Emblems_of_Britain-2) [National Flower: Leek](/wiki/File:Leek_Badge_of_Wales.svg "National Flower: Leek")  *or*  [Daffodil](/wiki/Narcissus_(plant) "Narcissus (plant)")[[2]](#cite_note-National_Emblems_of_Britain-2) [National Flower: Daffodil](/wiki/File:Daffodills_(Narcissus)_-_25.jpg "National Flower: Daffodil") | "Red Dragon" | [Royal Badge of Wales](/wiki/Royal_Badge_of_Wales "Royal Badge of Wales") [Coat of Arms: A Red Dragon on a Green and White Field](/wiki/File:Royal_Badge_of_Wales_(2008-2024).svg "Coat of Arms: A Red Dragon on a Green and White Field") | **[Cymru am byth](/wiki/Cymru_am_byth "Cymru am byth")** ([Welsh](/wiki/Welsh_language "Welsh language")) "Wales forever" | "[Hen Wlad Fy Nhadau](/wiki/Hen_Wlad_Fy_Nhadau "Hen Wlad Fy Nhadau")" (*de facto*) (Welsh) "Land of my Fathers" |

**None** formerly the [Ulster Banner](/wiki/Ulster_Banner "Ulster Banner") (1953–1973)[[Note 1]](#cite_note-7) [The Ulster banner, unofficial flag of Northern Ireland](/wiki/File:Flag_of_Northern_Ireland_(1953%E2%80%931972).svg "The Ulster banner, unofficial flag of Northern Ireland") | [St. Patrick](/wiki/Saint_Patrick "Saint Patrick")[[2]](#cite_note-National_Emblems_of_Britain-2) [Patron Saint: St. Patrick](/wiki/File:Saint_Patrick_Catholic_Church_(Junction_City,_Ohio)_-_stained_glass,_Saint_Patrick_-_detail.jpg "Patron Saint: St. Patrick") | [Flax Flower](/wiki/Flax "Flax")[[7]](#cite_note-8) [National Flower: Flax](/wiki/File:Perennial_flax_or_linum_perenne.jpg "National Flower: Flax")  or  [Shamrock](/wiki/Shamrock "Shamrock")[[2]](#cite_note-National_Emblems_of_Britain-2) [National Flower: Shamrock](/wiki/File:Shamrock_of_Ireland_(Heraldry).svg "National Flower: Shamrock") | [Irish elk (giant deer)](/wiki/Irish_elk "Irish elk")[[8]](#cite_note-9)[[9]](#cite_note-10) [Irish elk](/wiki/File:Megaloceros.jpg "Irish elk") | **None**   Former [coat of arms of Northern Ireland](/wiki/Coat_of_arms_of_Northern_Ireland "Coat of arms of Northern Ireland"): [Coat of Arms: St. George's Cross, with the Imperial Crown on top of the Red Hand of Ulster, in the centre](/wiki/File:Coat_of_Arms_of_Northern_Ireland.svg "Coat of Arms: St. George's Cross, with the Imperial Crown on top of the Red Hand of Ulster, in the centre") | **[Quis separabit?](/wiki/Quis_separabit%3F "Quis separabit?")** ([Latin](/wiki/Latin "Latin")) "Who will separate us?"  (*de facto*) | "[Londonderry Air](/wiki/Londonderry_Air "Londonderry Air")" (*de facto*) |

There has been no official national [flag of Northern Ireland](/wiki/Flag_of_Northern_Ireland "Flag of Northern Ireland")[[5]](#cite_note-5) [since 1973](/wiki/Northern_Ireland_Constitution_Act_1973 "Northern Ireland Constitution Act 1973"). However, the shown [Ulster banner](/wiki/Ulster_banner "Ulster banner"), official flag of the Government of Northern Ireland between 1953–1973, has since been the *de facto* flag of Northern Ireland, and continued to be used by international sporting organisations.[[6]](#cite_note-6) See [Northern Ireland flags issue](/wiki/Northern_Ireland_flags_issue "Northern Ireland flags issue") for more information.

[Flag of Jersey](/wiki/Flag_of_Jersey "Flag of Jersey") [Flag of Jersey](/wiki/File:Flag_of_Jersey.svg "Flag of Jersey") | [St. Helier](/wiki/Helier "Helier") [Patron Saint: St. Helier](/wiki/File:Saint_Helier_Liebfrauenbasilika_in_Tongeren.jpg "Patron Saint: St. Helier") | [Crapauds/Jersey Cow](/wiki/Spiny_toad "Spiny toad") [Traditional Animal Nickname: Toad/Crapauds](/wiki/File:Bufo_spinosus_60483430.jpg "Traditional Animal Nickname: Toad/Crapauds") | [Coat of arms of Jersey](/wiki/Coat_of_arms_of_Jersey "Coat of arms of Jersey") [Coat of Arms: 3 Gold Lions on a Red Field](/wiki/File:Coat_of_Arms_of_Jersey.svg "Coat of Arms: 3 Gold Lions on a Red Field") | "[Beautiful Jersey](/wiki/Beautiful_Jersey "Beautiful Jersey")" |

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

(Redirected from [Symbols of the United Kingdom, the Channel Islands and the Isle of Man](/w/index.php?title=Symbols_of_the_United_Kingdom,_the_Channel_Islands_and_the_Isle_of_Man&redirect=no "Symbols of the United Kingdom, the Channel Islands and the Isle of Man"))

Representations of Britain and Crown Dependencies

In addition to the national symbols used by the United Kingdom as a whole, each of [countries of the United Kingdom](/wiki/Countries_of_the_United_Kingdom "Countries of the United Kingdom") (England, Scotland, Wales, and Northern Ireland) and the [Crown Dependencies](/wiki/Crown_Dependencies "Crown Dependencies") (the Channel Islands and the Isle of Man) have their own unique symbols.

## United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=List_of_national_symbols_of_the_United_Kingdom,_the_Channel_Islands_and_the_Isle_of_Man&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland")]
